name: Markel Group
confidenceReason: Undergoing restructuring, exiting lower-margin reinsurance to boost ROE towards 15%.
bullCase: Markel's ongoing restructuring is bearing fruit as it exits lower-margin reinsurance to focus on highly profitable specialty lines. The 'Markel Ventures' private equity arm provides a robust, non-correlated earnings floor, driving margin expansion.
bearCase: Restructuring execution risk remains. If the combined ratio slips above 95%, the compounding math breaks down and the historical premium multiple will face permanent compression.
